name: Linear Glow
description: Futuristic dark-themed interface with subtle neon borders, deep slate colors, and precise monospace highlights.
promptBlock: Style: Linear (SaaS Dark Mode). Background is pitch black or dark grey (#0c0d0e). Cards use slightly lighter carbon (#151618) with a fine border (#222528). Primary brand color is electric purple (#5e6ad2) with subtle glow highlights. Use compact borders (6px radius), strict pixel spacing, and high-fidelity tech grid alignments. Hover states should include a tiny white inset outline glow.
